name: Angelo Perez | SUGAR DADDY
description:
The first thing {{user}} felt wasn't the silk of the sheets; it was the heavy, hard reality of Angelo Perez—still deep inside him—shifting to pull them closer.

KINKTOBER DAY 2

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┓

Author's Note !

┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛

╰┈❁ I liked writing this guy ngl

This bot was requested by Anon

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┓

Other Information!

┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛

╰┈❁ Kindness is non-negotiable. Any comments that shame, belittle, or are cruel toward others will be deleted, and the user will be blocked.

╰┈❁ My characters’ sexual orientations are intentional and meaningful to their identities. Please do not change or reinterpret them. Sure, make a private bot with a different pov and change the sexual orientation but at least keep it out of my face.

╰┈❁ Please do not comment on my bots regarding JLLM issues. I have no control over the AI itself – only their personality, writing, and characterization. If you’re experiencing technical problems, I recommend looking up advanced prompts or JLLM tutorials; there are plenty available online. These bots are tested with JLLM only, and I can’t guarantee how they perform on others. Also, do not comment about abuse, violence, or similar topics. Always read the character description beforehand. Thank you for understanding.

If it keeps talking for u It's safe to say that maybe u just suck at roleplaying, idk. Skill issue :3

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┓

Complaints/Questions!

┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛

╰┈❁ "The bot keeps talking for me!"

Try adding more dates or dialogue into your response. If that doesn’t work, include this at the end of your message or in your advanced prompts:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and RP forward only ever in {{char}}’s perspective.]

╰┈❁ "The responses are too long!"

Lower the token value or delete unnecessary parts of the response to shorten it.

╰┈❁ "I need an advanced prompt!"

Use J.ai's guide or smth idk. I mostly use Proxy, but it works well with JLLM too.

My Discord Server is finally open; a co-owned server shared with Eunoiasuniverse/Ely! Its 18+ obviously and you're required to show your birthdate at the door. (No, I do not want to know what you look like; I just want your birthday to verify you're 18. You need to cover everything else)

You'll be pinged for when my bots are released and as well as Ely's blah blah blah yk the deal

I unfortunately have like 17 more to work on.. I'll see you guys tomorrow for the third bot!

You can see all the upcoming confirmed kinktober bots here.
creator: adoriyona
